model.desc: Display measurement with given parameters in tooltip and highlight text with color

param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:translate(@type, false(), true()), ec:colon(), @quantity, ' ', ec:translate(@origin, false(), false()), ' ', ec:translate(@unit, @quantity > 1, false()), ' ', ec:translate(@commodity, false(), false()))

model.desc: Display measurement with given parameters in tooltip and highlight text with color

param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:translate(@type, false(), true()), ec:colon(), @quantity, ' ', ec:translate(@unit, @quantity > 1, false()), ' ', ec:translate(@commodity, false(), false()), ' ', ec:translate(@origin, false(), false()))
